title: Snackable
description: A mod that scales consume time based on food quality
body:
![Snackable Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LqomX8If/images/c23f5c45e2d67e139527d7b00f4b9fc4bee1e3cf_350.webp)

A Simple mod that makes less saturating food quicker to eat.

Consume speed is defined as: `Saturation / Nutrition * (the default consume speed of 1.6) `

This may or may not be compatible with modded food.
